steps.title: Connect migration and genetics
steps.content: The text says Ancestral Puebloans dispersed in the late 1200s and that Rio Grande Valley turkeys later shared genetic markers with turkeys cultivated at Mesa Verde. The conclusion should connect those facts.

steps.title: Reject unsupported conclusions
steps.content: Choice A invents a terrain comparison. Choice C overstates what the genetic evidence proves about pre-1280 Rio Grande practices. Choice D reverses the direction of influence suggested by Mesa Verde turkey genetics appearing in Rio Grande populations.

steps.title: Infer carried practices
steps.content: Choice B fits the evidence: some Ancestral Puebloans likely moved to the Rio Grande Valley in the late 1200s and brought turkey-farming practices with them. The answer is B.
